name: Snails Bourguignonne/ Escargots a La Bourguignonne
recipeInstructions:
Preparation 15 minutes. Cooking 15 minutes.
About 100 snails.
1. Remove the stalks from the mushrooms.
2. Season the mushroom caps with salt, pour the oil over them and sweat in the oven.
3. Place 4-5 snails in each mushroom cap.
4. Cover with snail butter and heat in the oven just before serving, exactly as you would serve snails in their shells.
Dry white wines: Quincy, Pouilly-Fume, Bourgogne-Aligote. Red wines: Saint-Emilion, Chinon, Bourgueil, Rully, Beaujolais-Villages.
[From "Larousse Traditional French Cooking."]
